ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that played the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (W/L) */,
  "point_diff" INTEGER /* Point difference in the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent FOREIGN KEY ("opponent") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently on */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "mp" TEXT /* Minutes played */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_percent" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pm" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made */,
  "three_pa" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted */,
  "three_percent" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_percent" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "orb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "drb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "trb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player in the game */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Player efficiency rating (PER) */,
  "usage_rate" REAL /* Player's usage rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_games" INTEGER /* Number of regular season games played */,
  "playoff_games" INTEGER /* Number of playoff games played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, All-Star) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started coaching the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach stopped coaching the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams_coaches" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coach started coaching the team for the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coach stopped coaching the team for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "coach_id", "season_id")
)
column_names: Venue where the game was played
Whether the game went into overtime
ID of the team the player is currently on
Unique identifier for each player-game statistics
Plus-minus rating for the player in the game
City where the team is based
Number of regular season games played
Date the coach started coaching the team
Date the coach stopped coaching the team
Date the coach started coaching the team for the season
Date the coach stopped coaching the team for the season
